translations.en: I would like to point that out.
translations.ru: Я хотел бы на это обратить внимание.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn lưu ý điều đó.
translations.nl: Ik wil daar graag op wijzen.
translations.uk: Я хотів би на це звернути увагу.
translations.hi: मैं इस पर ध्यान दिलाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.ja: その点を指摘したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 1st person; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II present), finite verb agreeing with the subject (1sg); selects the bare infinitive 'hinweisen'.
Pronominal adverb (da- + auf); stands in for a PP 'auf + pronoun'; complements the verb 'hinweisen' (auf + Acc).
Content verb in bare infinitive; has separable prefix 'hin-' (not split here); subcategorizes for a PP 'auf + Acc' and optionally an accusative object.

sentences.target: Er wollte mich auf den Fehler hinweisen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ˈvɔltə mɪç aʊ̯f deːn ˈfeːlɐ ˈhɪnvaɪ̯zn̩/

translations.de: Er wollte mich auf den Fehler hinweisen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ˈvɔltə mɪç aʊ̯f deːn ˈfeːlɐ ˈhɪnvaɪ̯zn̩/
translations.en: He wanted to point out the mistake to me.
translations.ko: 그는 내 실수를 지적하고 싶어 했어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他想向我指出那个错误。
translations.yue: 佢想向我指出嗰個錯誤。
translations.ru: Он хотел указать мне на ошибку.
translations.pt: Ele queria me mostrar o erro.
translations.he: הוא רצה להראות לי את הטעות.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn chỉ cho tôi lỗi đó.
translations.nl: Hij wilde me op de fout wijzen.
translations.uk: Він хотів вказати мені на помилку.
translations.hu: Szerette volna felhívni a figyelmemet a hibára.
translations.hi: वह मुझे गलती के बारे में बताना चाहता था.
translations.pl: Chciał zwrócić mi uwagę na błąd.
translations.el: Ήθελε να μου επισημάνει το λάθος.
translations.nb: Han ville påpeke feilen for meg.
translations.id: Dia ingin menunjukkan kesalahan itu kepada saya.
translations.sv: Han ville påpeka felet för mig.
translations.da: Han ville gøre mig opmærksom på fejlen.
translations.ja: 彼は私にその間違いを指摘したかった。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 3rd person; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, preterite 3rd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'hinweisen'; expresses past intention.
Personal pronoun, accusative singular, 1st person; direct object (the person being alerted) of 'hinweisen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the PP complement required by 'hinweisen'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Fehler'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the PP 'auf den Fehler' (the thing being pointed to).
Content verb in bare infinitive; separable prefix 'hin-' (not split here); takes an accusative object ('mich') plus PP 'auf + Acc'.

sentences.target: Wir müssen die Kunden darauf hinweisen.

translations.de: Wir müssen die Kunden darauf hinweisen.
translations.en: We have to point this out to the customers.
translations.es: Tenemos que señalarles esto a los clientes.
translations.fr: Nous devons le signaler aux clients.
translations.ko: 우리는 고객들에게 이 점을 알려야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得向客户说明这一点。
translations.ru: Нам нужно обратить внимание клиентов на это.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להבהיר את זה ללקוחות.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần nhắc khách hàng về điều này.
translations.nl: We moeten de klanten hierop wijzen.
translations.uk: Ми повинні звернути увагу клієнтів на це.
translations.hu: Erre fel kell hívnunk a vásárlók figyelmét.
translations.hi: हमें ग्राहकों को यह बात बतानी होगी.
translations.pl: Musimy zwrócić na to uwagę klientów.
translations.el: Πρέπει να το επισημάνουμε στους πελάτες.
translations.nb: Vi må gjøre kundene oppmerksomme på dette.
translations.id: Kita harus memberi tahu pelanggan tentang hal ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste uppmärksamma kunderna på detta.
translations.ro: Trebuie să le spunem clienților despre asta.
translations.da: Vi skal gøre kunderne opmærksomme på det.
translations.ja: これをお客様にお知らせする必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative plural, 1st person; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present 1st person plural; selects the bare infinitive 'hinweisen'; expresses necessity.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of 'Kunden'.
Common noun, plural; accusative direct object ('jemanden') of 'hinweisen'.
Pronominal adverb (da- + auf); fills the PP complement required by 'hinweisen' ('auf + Acc').
Content verb in bare infinitive; separable prefix 'hin-' (not split here); takes an accusative object ('die Kunden') and a PP 'darauf'.

sentences.target: Du solltest auf die Frist hinweisen.

translations.de: Du solltest auf die Frist hinweisen.
translations.en: You should point out the deadline.
translations.fr: Tu devrais rappeler la date limite.
translations.zh-Hans: 你应该提醒一下截止日期。
translations.yue: 你應該提一提截止日期。
translations.vi: Bạn nên nhắc về hạn chót.
translations.ar: عليك أن تشير إلى الموعد النهائي.
translations.nl: Je zou op de deadline moeten wijzen.
translations.hi: तुम्हें अंतिम तारीख का ज़िक्र करना चाहिए.
translations.el: Καλό είναι να επισημάνεις την προθεσμία.
translations.id: Kamu sebaiknya mengingatkan soal tenggat waktu.
translations.sv: Du borde påminna om sista datumet.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să menționezi termenul limită.
translations.da: Du bør gøre opmærksom på fristen.
translations.ja: 締め切りを伝えたほうがいい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 2nd person; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 2nd person singular (preterite/Konjunktiv II form used for advice); selects the bare infinitive 'hinweisen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the PP complement of 'hinweisen'.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Frist'.
Common noun, feminine; head of PP 'auf die Frist' (the thing being pointed to).
Content verb in bare infinitive; separable prefix 'hin-' (not split here); governs PP 'auf + Acc'.

He wanted to point out the mistake to me.
We have to point this out to the customers.
You should point out the deadline.
